'''vapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ricketily|ricketily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ricketily|ricketily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vapate|vapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vapatesher|vapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapatesherĂ«m|vapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vapatero|vapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vapateshĂ«|vapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapateshĂ«m|vapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivapatero|gokivapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivapateshĂ«|gokivapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapateshĂ«m|gokivapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govapankerom|govapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govapankeshĂ«|govapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govapankeshĂ«m|govapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govapankeya|govapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vapaterom|vapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapatemu|vapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vapateya|vapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivapaterom|gokivapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapatemu|gokivapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivapateya|gokivapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vapapate|vapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vapapatesher|vapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapapatesherĂ«m|vapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vapapatero|vapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vapapateshĂ«|vapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapapateshĂ«m|vapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivapapatero|gokivapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivapapateshĂ«|gokivapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapapateshĂ«m|gokivapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govapapankerom|govapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govapapankeshĂ«|govapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govapapankeshĂ«m|govapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govapapankeya|govapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vapapaterom|vapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapapatemu|vapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vapapateya|vapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivapapaterom|gokivapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapapatemu|gokivapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivapapateya|gokivapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠte|vĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠtesher|vĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠtero|vĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠpĂŠtero|gokivĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠpĂŠnkerom|govĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠpĂŠnkeya|govĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠterom|vĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠtemu|vĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠteya|vĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠpĂŠterom|gokivĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠpĂŠteya|gokivĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafpafte|vafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafpaftesher|vafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafpaftesherĂ«m|vafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafpaftero|vafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafpafteshĂ«|vafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafpafteshĂ«m|vafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafpaftero|gokivafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafpafteshĂ«|gokivafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafpafteshĂ«m|gokivafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafpafnkerom|govafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafpafnkeshĂ«|govafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafpafnkeshĂ«m|govafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafpafnkeya|govafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafpafterom|vafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafpaftemu|vafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafpafteya|vafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafpafterom|gokivafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafpaftemu|gokivafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafpafteya|gokivafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
